Package org.rodinp.keyboard.core

Class ExtensionSymbol

java.lang.Object
org.rodinp.internal.keyboard.core.symbols.Symbol
org.rodinp.keyboard.core.ExtensionSymbol
All Implemented Interfaces:
ISymbol
Direct Known Subclasses:
ExtensionSymbol
public class ExtensionSymbol extends Symbol
Class defining a extension symbol programmatically. This class emulates symbol elements of the symbols extension point. See org.rodinp.keyboard.core.schema/symbols.exsd
Since:
1.1

  • Constructor Summary

    Constructors
    Constructor
    Description
    ExtensionSymbol(String id, String name, String combo, String translation)
    A new symbol intended to extend the keyboard.

    Returns the combo intended to be entered by the user to produce this symbol.

    Returns the given name of this symbol.

  • Constructor Details

    • ExtensionSymbol

      public ExtensionSymbol(String id, String name, String combo, String translation)
      A new symbol intended to extend the keyboard.
      Parameters:
      id - the id of this symbol. This id must be unique
      name - the name of this symbol, used for example to show a tooltip on the symbol view associated with this symbol
      combo - the key combination to be entered to produce this symbol
      translation - the corresponding translation of this symbol in the model. It can be a textual translation or a mathematical translation (i.e. using math symbols)

  • Method Details

    • getId

      public String getId()
      Returns the id of this symbol.
      Returns:
      the id of this symbol

      public String getName()
      Returns the given name of this symbol.
      Returns:

      Returns:

    • getTranslation

      public String getTranslation()
      Returns the textual or mathematical translation associated to this symbol.
      Specified by:
      getTranslation in interface ISymbol
      Overrides:
      getTranslation in class Symbol
      Returns:
      the translation of this symbol
